understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to use the selectable pieces to move a pushable block onto the goal tile(s) marked by '+' in the semantic grid, or to satisfy the engine's WIN condition for the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by 3 pixels in the indicated direction, provided the path was not blocked by walls or other obstacles. Pushable blocks could be moved by pushing from an adjacent cell, but only if space allowed. Walls acted as barriers and did not always allow passage or pushing. Selection between multiple pieces was done with the CLICK action targeting the pixel coordinates of another selectable. The game’s grid and objects used a 3-pixel-per-cell coordinate system.
